name: web_scrape
description: Fetch a web page and return its plain-text content with title. Strips all HTML tags and returns readable text up to max_chars. Use after web_search to read the full content of a specific URL. Handles redirects and common encodings.

url.description: The full URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://).

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of text to return. Defaults to 8000.

title.description: Page title extracted from <title> tag, or empty string if not found.

text.description: Plain text content of the page with HTML stripped.

char_count.description: Total characters in the extracted text before truncation.

truncated.description: True if text was truncated to max_chars.
